# Creative Direction: Neo-Industrial Maximalism
- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- Style: Zenless Zone Zero (Tactical, Tech-labels) + Unbeatable (VHS, Glitch).
- Physics: High-tension spring animations (stiffness: 400, damping: 10).
- Rules: 
  - Use "Angled" layouts (skews/rotates).
  - Avoid rounded corners; use 45-degree chamfered edges.
  - Every button must have a "glitch" or "invert" hover state.
  - Include "Micro-labels" (e.g., [SYSTEM_AUTH], [DATA_LOAD]) in small caps.
